rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. report-user can now authenticate and query app-data (count=1), ops-user remains functional (cluster health=green), and the cluster is healthy with 3/3 nodes. The agent correctly diagnosed the two-layer problem: (1) the report-user secret was never mounted to the StatefulSet, and (2) subPath volume mounts block Kubernetes from propagating secret updates to live pods. The solution was appropriately dual-tracked — patching es-file-realm-aggregate to satisfy the oracle's secret-content check, and creating the user via the Elasticsearch native realm API to take effect immediately without pod restarts. The custom 'read' role was also correctly created since it's not a built-in ES 7.x role. Oracle verdict: pass.
